name: 전고음봉시가돌파
python_code:
BBU = (TI.bbands(df['close'], (20), (2))[0])
CCU = (TI.ema((df['close']), (20)) + TI.atr(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], (20)) * 2)
A1 = ((df['close'].shift(2)>BBU.shift(2)) | (df['close'].shift(1)>BBU.shift(1)) | (df['close']>BBU))
A2 = ((df['close'].shift(2)>CCU.shift(2)) | (df['close'].shift(1)>CCU.shift(1)) | (df['close']>CCU))
A3 = (df['open'].shift(2)<df['close'].shift(2)) & (df['open'].shift(1)<=df['close'].shift(1)) & (df['open']>df['close'])
B = ((A1) | (A2)) & (A3)
TargetLine = (pd.Series(np.where((B), (df['open']), np.nan), index=df.index).ffill())
cond = ((((df['close']).shift(1) <= (TargetLine).shift(1)) & ((df['close']) > (TargetLine))))
